data.name: AnnouncementSettingsCategory_AnnouncementThumbnailOption_Description
data.value: Thumbnail option for announcements.

data.name: AnnouncementSettingsCategory_CustomAnnouncementThumbnailUrl_Description
data.value: Custom thumbnail URL for announcements.

data.name: AnnouncementSettingsCategory_RandomAnnouncementColor_Description
data.value: Enable random color selection for announcements.

data.name: AnnouncementSettingsCategory_RandomAnnouncementThumbnail_Description
data.value: Enable random thumbnail selection for announcements.

data.name: BaseConfig_AntiIdle_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will press the B button occasionally when it is not processing anything (to avoid sleep).

data.name: BaseConfig_LoggingEnabled_Description
data.value: Enables text logs. Restart to apply changes.

data.name: BaseConfig_MaxArchiveFiles_Description
data.value: Maximum number of old text log files to retain. Set this to <= 0 to disable log cleanup. Restart to apply changes.

data.name: BaseConfig_SkipConsoleBotCreation_Description
data.value: Skips creating bots when the program is started; helpful for testing integrations.

data.name: BaseConfig_UseKeyboard_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will Enter Link Trade Code via Keyboard (faster).

data.name: BilibiliSettings_LogUrl_Description
data.value: B站彈幕姬日志目录

data.name: BilibiliSettings_RoomId_Description
data.value: 直播间ID

data.name: Category_BotEncounter
data.value: BotEncounter

data.name: Category_BotTrade
data.value: BotTrade

data.name: Category_Channels
data.value: Channels

data.name: Category_CloseGame
data.value: CloseGame

data.name: Category_Configure
data.value: Configure

data.name: Category_CountStats
data.value: CountStats

data.name: Category_Counts
data.value: Counts

data.name: Category_Debug
data.value: Debug

data.name: Category_Distribute
data.value: Distribute

data.name: Category_Embed Settings
data.value: Embed Settings

data.name: Category_EmbedSettings
data.value: EmbedSettings

data.name: Category_Encounter
data.value: Encounter

data.name: Category_FeatureToggle
data.value: FeatureToggle

data.name: Category_Files
data.value: Files

data.name: Category_Fossil
data.value: Fossil

data.name: Category_Generate
data.value: Generate

data.name: Category_Hosting
data.value: Hosting

data.name: Category_Integration
data.value: Integration

data.name: Category_Messages
data.value: Messages

data.name: Category_Misc
data.value: Misc

data.name: Category_Miscellaneous
data.value: Miscellaneous

data.name: Category_Monitoring
data.value: Monitoring

data.name: Category_OpenGame
data.value: OpenGame

data.name: Category_Operation
data.value: Operation

data.name: Category_QueueToggle
data.value: QueueToggle

data.name: Category_Raid
data.value: Raid

data.name: Category_Recovery
data.value: Recovery

data.name: Category_Roles
data.value: Roles

data.name: Category_Servers
data.value: Servers

data.name: Category_Settings
data.value: Settings

data.name: Category_Startup
data.value: Startup

data.name: Category_StopConditions
data.value: StopConditions

data.name: Category_Synchronize
data.value: Synchronize

data.name: Category_TimeBias
data.value: TimeBias

data.name: Category_TradeConfig
data.value: TradeConfig

data.name: Category_UserBias
data.value: UserBias

data.name: Category_Users
data.value: Users

data.name: Category_WebServer
data.value: WebServer

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedClones_Description
data.value: Completed Clone Trades (Specific User)

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedDistribution_Description
data.value: Completed Link Trades (Distribution)

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedDumps_Description
data.value: Completed Dump Trades (Specific User)

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedFixOTs_Description
data.value: Completed FixOT Trades (Specific User)

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedSeedChecks_Description
data.value: Completed Seed Check Trades

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedSurprise_Description
data.value: Completed Surprise Trades

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_CompletedTrades_Description
data.value: Completed Link Trades (Specific User)

data.name: CountStatsSettingsCategory_EmitCountsOnStatusCheck_Description
data.value: When enabled, the counts will be emitted when a status check is requested.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AbuseLogChannels_Description
data.value: Channels that will log abuse messages.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AbuseLogChannels_DisplayName
data.value: Abuse Log Channels

data.name: DiscordSettings_AdditionalEmbedText_Description
data.value: Additional text to add to the beginning of the embed description.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AdditionalEmbedText_DisplayName
data.value: Additional Embed Text

data.name: DiscordSettings_AllowAnyPrefix_Description
data.value: When True, allows any of the following prefixes to be used: $ ! . = % ~ - + , / ? * ^ < > ` ; : If False, reverts to default prefix with a message for the correct prefix.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AllowAnyPrefix_DisplayName
data.value: Allow Any Prefix

data.name: DiscordSettings_AllowGlobalSudo_Description
data.value: Disabling this will remove global sudo support.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AllowGlobalSudo_DisplayName
data.value: Allow Global Sudo

data.name: DiscordSettings_AnnouncementChannels_Description
data.value: Channels that will log special messages, like announcements.

data.name: DiscordSettings_AnnouncementChannels_DisplayName
data.value: Announcement Channels

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotColorStatusTradeOnly_Description
data.value: Indicates the Discord presence status color only considering bots that are Trade-type.

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotColorStatusTradeOnly_DisplayName
data.value: Status Color Trade Change

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotEmbedStatus_Description
data.value: Will send a status Embed for Online/Offline to all Whitelisted Channels.

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotEmbedStatus_DisplayName
data.value: Bot Embed Status

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotGameStatus_Description
data.value: Custom Status for playing a game.

data.name: DiscordSettings_BotGameStatus_DisplayName
data.value: Bot Game Status

data.name: DiscordSettings_ChannelStatus_Description
data.value: Will add online/offline emoji to channel name based on current status. Whitelisted channels only.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ChannelStatus_DisplayName
data.value: Channel Status

data.name: DiscordSettings_ChannelWhitelist_Description
data.value: Channels with these IDs are the only channels where the bot acknowledges commands.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ChannelWhitelist_DisplayName
data.value: Channel Whitelist

data.name: DiscordSettings_CommandPrefix_Description
data.value: Bot command prefix.

data.name: DiscordSettings_CommandPrefix_DisplayName
data.value: Default Command Prefix

data.name: DiscordSettings_ConvertPKMReplyAnyChannel_Description
data.value: Bot can reply with a ShowdownSet in any channel the bot can see, instead of only channels the bot has been whitelisted to run in. Only make this true if you want the bot to serve more utility in non-bot channels.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ConvertPKMReplyAnyChannel_DisplayName
data.value: Convert PKMs (All Channels)

data.name: DiscordSettings_ConvertPKMToShowdownSet_Description
data.value: Bot listens to channel messages to reply with a ShowdownSet whenever a PKM file is attached (not with a command).

data.name: DiscordSettings_ConvertPKMToShowdownSet_DisplayName
data.value: Convert PKMs to Showdown

data.name: DiscordSettings_DeleteUserCommandMessages_Description
data.value: When enabled, user command messages will be deleted along with bot responses. Disable to keep user commands visible.

data.name: DiscordSettings_DeleteUserCommandMessages_DisplayName
data.value: Delete Bot Commands

data.name: DiscordSettings_ErrorMessageDeleteDelaySeconds_Description
data.value: Number of seconds to wait before deleting bot error/response messages. Only applies if MessageDeletionEnabled is true.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ErrorMessageDeleteDelaySeconds_DisplayName
data.value: Delete Message Delay

data.name: DiscordSettings_FullTradeErrorLogChannels_Description
data.value: Channel that will log detailed trade error information including user requests and failure reasons.

data.name: DiscordSettings_FullTradeErrorLogChannels_DisplayName
data.value: Full Trade Error Log Channel

data.name: DiscordSettings_GlobalSudoList_Description
data.value: Comma separated Discord user IDs that will have sudo access to the Bot Hub.

data.name: DiscordSettings_GlobalSudoList_DisplayName
data.value: Global Sudo List

data.name: DiscordSettings_HelloResponse_Description
data.value: Custom message the bot will reply with when a user says hello to it. Use string formatting to mention the user in the reply.

data.name: DiscordSettings_HelloResponse_DisplayName
data.value: Hello Response

data.name: DiscordSettings_LoggingChannels_Description
data.value: Channel IDs that will echo the log bot data.

data.name: DiscordSettings_LoggingChannels_DisplayName
data.value: Logging Channels

data.name: DiscordSettings_MessageDeletionEnabled_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will automatically delete error messages and user commands after a delay. Disable to keep all messages permanently.

data.name: DiscordSettings_MessageDeletionEnabled_DisplayName
data.value: Message Deletion

data.name: DiscordSettings_ModuleBlacklist_Description
data.value: List of modules that will not be loaded when the bot is started (comma separated).

data.name: DiscordSettings_ModuleBlacklist_DisplayName
data.value: Module Blacklist

data.name: DiscordSettings_OfflineEmoji_Description
data.value: Custom emoji to use when the bot is offline.

data.name: DiscordSettings_OfflineEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Offline Emoji

data.name: DiscordSettings_OnlineEmoji_Description
data.value: Custom emoji to use when the bot is online.

data.name: DiscordSettings_OnlineEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Online Emoji

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReplyCannotUseCommandInChannel_Description
data.value: Replies to users if they are not allowed to use a given command in the channel. When false, the bot will silently ignore them instead.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReplyCannotUseCommandInChannel_DisplayName
data.value: Reply on Command Error

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReplyToThanks_Description
data.value: Will send a random response to a user that thanks the bot.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReplyToThanks_DisplayName
data.value: Reply to Thanks

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReturnPKMs_Description
data.value: Returns PKMs of Pokémon shown in the trade to the user.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ReturnPKMs_DisplayName
data.value: Return User-Traded PKM Files

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanClone_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to enter the Clone queue.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanClone_DisplayName
data.value: Role can Clone

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanDump_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to enter the Dump queue.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanDump_DisplayName
data.value: Role can Dump

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanFixOT_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to enter the FixOT queue.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanFixOT_DisplayName
data.value: Role can FixOT

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanSeedCheckorSpecialRequest_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to enter the Seed Check/Special Request queue.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanSeedCheckorSpecialRequest_DisplayName
data.value: Role can Seed/Special Request

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanTrade_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to enter the Trade queue.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleCanTrade_DisplayName
data.value: Role can Trade

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleFavored_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to join the queue with a better position.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleFavored_DisplayName
data.value: Favored Roles

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleRemoteControl_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to remotely control the console (if running as Remote Control Bot.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleRemoteControl_DisplayName
data.value: User Remote Control

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleSudo_Description
data.value: Users with this role are allowed to bypass command restrictions.

data.name: DiscordSettings_RoleSudo_DisplayName
data.value: Allowed Sudo Roles

data.name: DiscordSettings_ServerBlacklist_Description
data.value: Servers with these IDs will not be able to use the bot, and it will leave the server.

data.name: DiscordSettings_ServerBlacklist_DisplayName
data.value: Server Blacklist

data.name: DiscordSettings_Token_Description
data.value: Bot login token.

data.name: DiscordSettings_Token_DisplayName
data.value: Discord Bot Token

data.name: DiscordSettings_TradeStartingChannels_Description
data.value: Logger channels that will log trade start messages.

data.name: DiscordSettings_TradeStartingChannels_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Starting Embed Channels

data.name: DiscordSettings_UserBlacklist_Description
data.value: Users with these user IDs cannot use the bot.

data.name: DiscordSettings_UserBlacklist_DisplayName
data.value: User Blacklist

data.name: DiscordSettings_UserDMsToBotForwarder_Description
data.value: User ID or Channel ID to forward bot DMs to. Leave empty to disable.

data.name: DiscordSettings_UserDMsToBotForwarder_DisplayName
data.value: Bot DMs Channel

data.name: DistributionSettings_DistributeWhileIdle_Description
data.value: When enabled, idle LinkTrade bots will randomly distribute PKM files from the DistributeFolder.

data.name: DistributionSettings_DistributeWhileIdle_DisplayName
data.value: Distribute While Idle

data.name: DistributionSettings_LedyQuitIfNoMatch_Description
data.value: When set to true, Random Ledy nickname-swap trades will quit rather than trade a random entity from the pool.

data.name: DistributionSettings_LedyQuitIfNoMatch_DisplayName
data.value: Ledy Quit on No Match

data.name: DistributionSettings_LedySpecies_Description
data.value: When set to something other than None, the Random Trades will require this species in addition to the nickname match.

data.name: DistributionSettings_LedySpecies_DisplayName
data.value: Ledy Species

data.name: DistributionSettings_RandomCode_Description
data.value: Distribution Trade Link Code uses the Min and Max range rather than the fixed trade code.

data.name: DistributionSettings_RandomCode_DisplayName
data.value: Random Code

data.name: DistributionSettings_RemainInUnionRoomBDSP_Description
data.value: For BDSP, the distribution bot will go to a specific room and remain there until the bot is stopped.

data.name: DistributionSettings_RemainInUnionRoomBDSP_DisplayName
data.value: Remain in Union Room

data.name: DistributionSettings_Shuffled_Description
data.value: When enabled, the DistributionFolder will yield randomly rather than in the same sequence.

data.name: DistributionSettings_Shuffled_DisplayName
data.value: Shuffle Distribution Folder

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeBots_Description
data.value: Link Trade: Using multiple distribution bots -- all bots will confirm their trade code at the same time. When Local, the bots will continue when all are at the barrier. When Remote, something else must signal the bots to continue.

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeBots_DisplayName
data.value: Synchronize Bots

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeDelayBarrier_Description
data.value: Link Trade: Using multiple distribution bots -- once all bots are ready to confirm trade code, the Hub will wait X milliseconds before releasing all bots.

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeDelayBarrier_DisplayName
data.value: Synchronize Delay Barrier

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeTimeout_Description
data.value: Link Trade: Using multiple distribution bots -- how long (seconds) a bot will wait for synchronization before continuing anyways.

data.name: DistributionSettings_SynchronizeTimeout_DisplayName
data.value: Synchronize Timeout

data.name: DistributionSettings_TradeCode_Description
data.value: Distribution Trade Link Code.

data.name: DistributionSettings_TradeCode_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Code

data.name: EmojiInfo_CountStatsSettings_Description
data.value: Settings related to Trade Count Statistics.

data.name: EmojiInfo_CountStatsSettings_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Count Statistics Settings

data.name: EmojiInfo_EmojiString_Description
data.value: The full string for the emoji.

data.name: EmojiInfo_TradeConfiguration_Description
data.value: Settings related to Trade Configuration.

data.name: EmojiInfo_TradeConfiguration_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Configuration

data.name: EmojiInfo_TradeEmbedSettings_Description
data.value: Settings related to the Trade Embed in Discord.

data.name: EmojiInfo_TradeEmbedSettings_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Embed Settings

data.name: EncounterSettings_CompletedEggs_Description
data.value: Eggs Retrieved

data.name: EncounterSettings_CompletedEncounters_Description
data.value: Encountered Wild Pokémon

data.name: EncounterSettings_CompletedFossils_Description
data.value: Fossil Pokémon Revived

data.name: EncounterSettings_CompletedLegends_Description
data.value: Encountered Legendary Pokémon

data.name: EncounterSettings_ContinueAfterMatch_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will continue after finding a suitable match.

data.name: EncounterSettings_EmitCountsOnStatusCheck_Description
data.value: When enabled, the counts will be emitted when a status check is requested.

data.name: EncounterSettings_EncounteringType_Description
data.value: The method used by the Line and Reset bots to encounter Pokémon.

data.name: EncounterSettings_ScreenOff_Description
data.value: When enabled, the screen will be turned off during normal bot loop operation to save power.

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_EnableFavoritism_Description
data.value: Enable or disable priority user favoritism. When disabled, all users are treated equally.

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_EnableFavoritism_DisplayName
data.value: Enable Favoritism

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_MinimumRegularUsersFirst_Description
data.value: Minimum number of regular users that must be processed before any priority user can skip ahead. This prevents priority users from completely blocking regular users, even in large queues.

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_MinimumRegularUsersFirst_DisplayName
data.value: Minimum User Amount Before Favoritism

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_SkipPercentage_Description
data.value: Percentage of regular users that priority users can skip (0-100). For example: 50% means a priority user joins halfway through the regular users in queue. Higher percentage = more favorable to priority users.

data.name: FavoredPrioritySettings_SkipPercentage_DisplayName
data.value: Skip Percentage

data.name: FolderSettings_BattleReadyPKMFolder_Description
data.value: Path to your BattleReady Folder. Create a new folder called 'battleready' and copy the path here.

data.name: FolderSettings_BattleReadyPKMFolder_DisplayName
data.value: Battle-Ready Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_DistributeFolder_Description
data.value: Source folder: where PKM files to distribute are selected from.

data.name: FolderSettings_DistributeFolder_DisplayName
data.value: Distribute Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_DumpFolder_Description
data.value: Destination folder: where all received PKM files are dumped to.

data.name: FolderSettings_DumpFolder_DisplayName
data.value: Dump Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_Dump_Description
data.value: When enabled, dumps any received PKM files (trade results) to the DumpFolder.

data.name: FolderSettings_Dump_DisplayName
data.value: Enable Dump

data.name: FolderSettings_EventsFolder_Description
data.value: Path to your Events Folder. Create a new folder called 'events' and copy the path here.

data.name: FolderSettings_EventsFolder_DisplayName
data.value: Events Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_HOMEReadyPKMFolder_Description
data.value: Directory where your HOME Tracked Pokémon are located.

data.name: FolderSettings_HOMEReadyPKMFolder_DisplayName
data.value: HOME-Ready Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_PKHeXDirectory_Description
data.value: Directory where your PKHeX executable is located.

data.name: FolderSettings_PKHeXDirectory_DisplayName
data.value: PKHeX Folder

data.name: FolderSettings_SwitchRemoteForPC_Description
data.value: Directory where your Switch Remote For PC is located.

data.name: FolderSettings_SwitchRemoteForPC_DisplayName
data.value: Switch Remote for PC Location

data.name: FossilSettings_InjectWhenEmpty_Description
data.value: Toggle for injecting fossil pieces.

data.name: FossilSettings_Species_Description
data.value: Species of fossil Pokémon to hunt for.

data.name: LegalitySettings_AllowBatchCommands_Description
data.value: Allow users to submit further customization with Batch Editor commands.

data.name: LegalitySettings_AllowTrainerDataOverride_Description
data.value: Allow users to submit custom OT, TID, SID, and OT Gender in Showdown sets.

data.name: LegalitySettings_DisallowNonNatives_Description
data.value: Prevents trading Pokémon that require a HOME Tracker, even if the file has one already.

data.name: LegalitySettings_DisallowNonNatives_DisplayName
data.value: Disallow Non-Native Pokémon

data.name: LegalitySettings_DisallowTracked_Description
data.value: Prevents trading Pokémon that already have a HOME Tracker.

data.name: LegalitySettings_DisallowTracked_DisplayName
data.value: Disallow Home Tracked Pokémon

data.name: LegalitySettings_EnableEasterEggs_Description
data.value: Bot will create an Easter Egg Pokémon if provided an illegal set.

data.name: LegalitySettings_EnableHOMETrackerCheck_Description
data.value: Requires HOME tracker when trading Pokémon that had to have traveled between the Switch games.

data.name: LegalitySettings_ForceLevel100for50_Description
data.value: Assumes level 50 sets are level 100 competitive sets.

data.name: LegalitySettings_ForceSpecifiedBall_Description
data.value: Force the specified ball if legal.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GameVersionPriority_Description
data.value: Method of searching for encounters when generating Pokémon. "NativeOnly" searches current game pair only, "NewestFirst" searches from most recent game, and "PriorityOrder" uses the order designated in the "PriorityOrder" setting.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GenerateLanguage_Description
data.value: Default language for PKM files that don't match any of the provided PKM files.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GenerateOT_Description
data.value: Default Original Trainer name for PKM files that don't match any of the provided PKM files.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GeneratePathTrainerInfo_Description
data.value: Folder for PKM files with trainer data to use for regenerated PKM files.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GenerateSID16_Description
data.value: Default 16-bit Secret ID (SID) for requests that don't match any of the provided trainer data files. This should be a 5-digit number.

data.name: LegalitySettings_GenerateTID16_Description
data.value: Default 16-bit Trainer ID (TID) for requests that don't match any of the provided trainer data files. This should be a 5-digit number.

data.name: LegalitySettings_MGDBPath_Description
data.value: MGDB directory path for Wonder Cards.

data.name: LegalitySettings_PrioritizeEncounters_Description
data.value: The order in which Pokémon encounter types are attempted.

data.name: LegalitySettings_PriorityOrder_Description
data.value: The order of GameVersions ALM will attempt to legalize from.

data.name: LegalitySettings_ResetHOMETracker_Description
data.value: Zero out HOME trackers for cloned and user-requested PKM files. It is recommended to leave this disabled to avoid creating invalid HOME data.

data.name: LegalitySettings_SetAllLegalRibbons_Description
data.value: Set all possible legal ribbons for any generated Pokémon.

data.name: LegalitySettings_SetBattleVersion_Description
data.value: Adds Battle Version for games that support it (SWSH only) for using past-gen Pokémon in online competitive play.

data.name: LegalitySettings_SetMatchingBalls_Description
data.value: Set a matching ball (based on color) for any generated Pokémon.

data.name: LegalitySettings_Timeout_Description
data.value: Maximum time in seconds to spend when generating a set before canceling. This prevents difficult sets from freezing the bot.

data.name: LegalitySettings_UseTradePartnerInfo_Description
data.value: Apply valid pokemon with the trainers OT/SID/TID (AutoOT)

data.name: MoveTypeEmojiInfo_EmojiCode_Description
data.value: The Discord emoji string for this move type.

data.name: MoveTypeEmojiInfo_MoveType_Description
data.value: The type of move.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_BotLogoImage_Description
data.value: 208x101 logo image URL or file directory to display in the top left corner. Requires a program restart.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_BotLogoSparkleColor1_Description
data.value: First sparkle color behind the logo. Enter as RGB (e.g. "255, 20, 200"). Leave blank to use the default neon palette. Requires a program restart.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_BotLogoSparkleColor2_Description
data.value: Second sparkle color behind the logo. Enter as RGB (e.g. "0, 200, 255"). Leave blank to use the default neon palette. Requires a program restart.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_BotName_Description
data.value: Name of the Discord Bot the Program is Running. This will Title the window for easier recognition. Requires program restart.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Distribution_Description
data.value: Settings for idle distribution trades.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Favoritism_Description
data.value: Allows favored users to join the queue with a more favorable position than unfavored users.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Language_Description
data.value: UI language for the program. Translates the Main, Bots, Hub, and Logs forms. Pokemon details and Discord messages remain in English. Requires a program restart.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Recovery_Description
data.value: Settings for automatic bot recovery after crashes.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_StopConditions_Description
data.value: Stop conditions for EncounterBot.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Stream_Description
data.value: Configure generation of assets for streaming.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_ThemeOption_Description
data.value: Users Theme Option Choice.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_Timings_Description
data.value: Add extra time for slower Switches.

data.name: PokeTradeHubConfig_WebServer_Description
data.value: Settings for the Web Control Panel server.

data.name: QueueSettings_CanDequeueIfProcessing_Description
data.value: Allows users to dequeue while being traded.

data.name: QueueSettings_CanQueue_Description
data.value: Toggles if users can join the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_EstimatedDelayFactor_Description
data.value: Multiplies the amount of users in queue to give an estimate of how much time it will take until the user is processed.

data.name: QueueSettings_FlexMode_Description
data.value: Determines how Flex Mode will process the queues.

data.name: QueueSettings_IntervalCloseFor_Description
data.value: Scheduled Mode: Seconds of being closed before the queue unlocks.

data.name: QueueSettings_IntervalOpenFor_Description
data.value: Scheduled Mode: Seconds of being open before the queue locks.

data.name: QueueSettings_MaxQueueCount_Description
data.value: Prevents adding users if there are this many users in the queue already.

data.name: QueueSettings_NotifyOnQueueClose_Description
data.value: When enabled, sends an embed notification to announcement channels when the queue closes due to max capacity.

data.name: QueueSettings_QueueToggleMode_Description
data.value: Determines when the queue is turned on and off.

data.name: QueueSettings_ThresholdLock_Description
data.value: Threshold Mode: Count of users that will cause the queue to close.

data.name: QueueSettings_ThresholdUnlock_Description
data.value: Threshold Mode: Count of users that will cause the queue to open.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultCountClone_Description
data.value: Biases the Clone Queue's weight based on how many users are in the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultCountDump_Description
data.value: Biases the Dump Queue's weight based on how many users are in the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultCountFixOT_Description
data.value: Biases the FixOT Queue's weight based on how many users are in the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultCountSeedCheck_Description
data.value: Biases the Seed Check Queue's weight based on how many users are in the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultCountTrade_Description
data.value: Biases the Trade Queue's weight based on how many users are in the queue.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWaitClone_Description
data.value: Checks time elapsed since the user joined the Clone queue, and increases the queue's weight accordingly.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWaitDump_Description
data.value: Checks time elapsed since the user joined the Dump queue, and increases the queue's weight accordingly.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWaitFixOT_Description
data.value: Checks time elapsed since the user joined the FixOT queue, and increases the queue's weight accordingly.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWaitSeedCheck_Description
data.value: Checks time elapsed since the user joined the Seed Check queue, and increases the queue's weight accordingly.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWaitTrade_Description
data.value: Checks time elapsed since the user joined the Trade queue, and increases the queue's weight accordingly.

data.name: QueueSettings_YieldMultWait_Description
data.value: Determines whether the weight should be added or multiplied to the total weight.

data.name: RaidSettings_CompletedRaids_Description
data.value: Raids Started

data.name: RaidSettings_EchoPartyReady_Description
data.value: Echoes each party member as they lock into a Pokémon.

data.name: RaidSettings_EmitCountsOnStatusCheck_Description
data.value: When enabled, the counts will be emitted when a status check is requested.

data.name: RaidSettings_FriendCode_Description
data.value: Allows the bot to echo your Friend Code if set.

data.name: RaidSettings_InitialRaidsToHost_Description
data.value: Number of raids to host before trying to add/remove friends. Setting a value of 1 will tell the bot to host one raid, then start adding/removing friends.

data.name: RaidSettings_MaxRaidCode_Description
data.value: Maximum Link Code to host the raid with. Set this to -1 to host with no code.

data.name: RaidSettings_MinRaidCode_Description
data.value: Minimum Link Code to host the raid with. Set this to -1 to host with no code.

data.name: RaidSettings_NumberFriendsToAdd_Description
data.value: Number of friend requests to accept each time.

data.name: RaidSettings_NumberFriendsToDelete_Description
data.value: Number of friends to delete each time.

data.name: RaidSettings_ProfileNumber_Description
data.value: The Nintendo Switch profile you are using to manage friends. For example, set this to 2 if you are using the second profile.

data.name: RaidSettings_RaidDescription_Description
data.value: Optional description of the raid the bot is hosting. Uses automatic Pokémon detection if left blank.

data.name: RaidSettings_RaidsBetweenAddFriends_Description
data.value: Number of raids to host between trying to add friends.

data.name: RaidSettings_RaidsBetweenDeleteFriends_Description
data.value: Number of raids to host between trying to delete friends.

data.name: RaidSettings_RowStartAddingFriends_Description
data.value: Number of row to start trying to add friends.

data.name: RaidSettings_RowStartDeletingFriends_Description
data.value: Number of row to start trying to delete friends.

data.name: RaidSettings_ScreenOff_Description
data.value: When enabled, the screen will be turned off during normal bot loop operation to save power.

data.name: RaidSettings_TimeToWait_Description
data.value: Number of seconds to wait before trying to start a raid. Ranges from 0 to 180 seconds.

data.name: RecoverySettings_BackoffMultiplier_Description
data.value: Multiplier for exponential backoff (e.g., 2.0 doubles the delay each time).

data.name: RecoverySettings_CrashHistoryWindowMinutes_Description
data.value: Time window in minutes to track crash history. Crashes outside this window are not counted.

data.name: RecoverySettings_EnableRecovery_Description
data.value: Enables automatic recovery attempts for crashed or stopped bots.

data.name: RecoverySettings_InitialRecoveryDelaySeconds_Description
data.value: Initial delay in seconds before attempting to restart a crashed bot.

data.name: RecoverySettings_MaxCrashesInWindow_Description
data.value: Maximum number of crashes allowed within the history window before permanent shutdown.

data.name: RecoverySettings_MaxRecoveryAttempts_Description
data.value: Maximum number of consecutive recovery attempts before giving up on a bot.

data.name: RecoverySettings_MaxRecoveryDelaySeconds_Description
data.value: Maximum delay in seconds between recovery attempts (for exponential backoff).

data.name: RecoverySettings_MinimumStableUptimeSeconds_Description
data.value: Minimum uptime in seconds before a bot is considered stable (resets recovery attempts).

data.name: RecoverySettings_NotifyOnRecoveryAttempt_Description
data.value: Send notifications when a bot crashes and recovery is attempted.

data.name: RecoverySettings_NotifyOnRecoveryFailure_Description
data.value: Send notifications when a bot fails to recover after all attempts.

data.name: RecoverySettings_RecoverIntentionalStops_Description
data.value: Enables recovery for bots that were intentionally stopped (useful for network disconnections).

data.name: RecoverySettings_SuccessfulRecoveryResetDelaySeconds_Description
data.value: Delay in seconds to wait after a successful recovery before resetting the attempt counter.

data.name: SeedCheckSettings_ResultDisplayMode_Description
data.value: Allows returning only the closest shiny frame, the first star and square shiny frames, or the first three shiny frames.

data.name: SeedCheckSettings_ShowAllZ3Results_Description
data.value: When enabled, seed checks will return all possible seed results instead of the first valid match.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_CaptureVideoClip_Description
data.value: Holds Capture button to record a 30 second clip when a matching Pokémon is found by EncounterBot or Fossilbot.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_ExtraTimeWaitCaptureVideo_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait after an encounter is matched before pressing Capture for EncounterBot or Fossilbot.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_MarkOnly_Description
data.value: Stop only on Pokémon that have a mark.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_MatchFoundEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be prepended to the result found log message to Echo alerts for whomever you specify. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_MatchShinyAndIV_Description
data.value: If set to TRUE, matches both ShinyTarget and TargetIVs settings. Otherwise, looks for either ShinyTarget or TargetIVs match.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_ShinyTarget_Description
data.value: Selects the shiny type to stop on.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_StopOnForm_Description
data.value: Stops only on Pokémon with this FormID. No restrictions if left blank.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_StopOnSpecies_Description
data.value: Stops only on Pokémon of this species. No restrictions if set to "None".

data.name: StopConditionSettings_TargetMaxIVs_Description
data.value: Maximum accepted IVs in the format HP/Atk/Def/SpA/SpD/Spe. Use "x" for unchecked IVs and "/" as a separator.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_TargetMinIVs_Description
data.value: Minimum accepted IVs in the format HP/Atk/Def/SpA/SpD/Spe. Use "x" for unchecked IVs and "/" as a separator.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_TargetNature_Description
data.value: Stop only on Pokémon of the specified nature.

data.name: StopConditionSettings_UnwantedMarks_Description
data.value: List of marks to ignore separated by commas. Use the full name, e.g. "Uncommon Mark, Dawn Mark, Prideful Mark".

data.name: StreamSettings_CompletedTradesFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the Completed Trades. {0} = Count

data.name: StreamSettings_CompletedTradesFormat_DisplayName
data.value: Completed Trades Formatting

data.name: StreamSettings_CopyImageFile_Description
data.value: Copies the TradeBlockFile if it exists, otherwise, a placeholder image is copied instead.

data.name: StreamSettings_CopyImageFile_DisplayName
data.value: Link Code Block Image

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateAssets_Description
data.value: Generate stream assets; turning off will prevent generation of assets.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateAssets_DisplayName
data.value: Create Enabled Streaming Files

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateCompletedTrades_Description
data.value: Create a file indicating the count of completed trades when a new trade starts.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateCompletedTrades_DisplayName
data.value: Create Completed Trades File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateEstimatedTime_Description
data.value: Create a file listing the estimated amount of time a user will have to wait if they joined the queue.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateEstimatedTime_DisplayName
data.value: Create ETA File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateOnDeck2_Description
data.value: Generate a list of People currently on-deck #2.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateOnDeck2_DisplayName
data.value: Create On Deck File 2

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateOnDeck_Description
data.value: Generate a list of People currently on-deck.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateOnDeck_DisplayName
data.value: Create On Deck File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateTradeStartSprite_Description
data.value: Generate trade start details, indicating what the bot is trading.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateTradeStartSprite_DisplayName
data.value: Create Trade Start Sprite

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateTradeStart_Description
data.value: Generate trade start details, indicating who the bot is trading with.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateTradeStart_DisplayName
data.value: Create Trade Start File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateUserList_Description
data.value: Generate a list of People currently being traded.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateUserList_DisplayName
data.value: Create User List File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateUsersInQueue_Description
data.value: Create a file indicating the count of users in the queue.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateUsersInQueue_DisplayName
data.value: Create User Queue File

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateWaitedTime_Description
data.value: Create a file listing the amount of time the most recently dequeued user has waited.

data.name: StreamSettings_CreateWaitedTime_DisplayName
data.value: Create Time Waited File

data.name: StreamSettings_EstimatedFulfillmentFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the Estimated Wait Timestamp.

data.name: StreamSettings_EstimatedFulfillmentFormat_DisplayName
data.value: Create Waited Time File

data.name: StreamSettings_EstimatedTimeFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the Estimated Wait Time.

data.name: StreamSettings_EstimatedTimeFormat_DisplayName
data.value: Create Estimated Wait File

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckFormat2_Description
data.value: Format to display the on-deck #2 list users. {0} = ID, {3} = User

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckFormat2_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck 2 Formatting

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the on-deck list users. {0} = ID, {3} = User

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckFormat_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck Formatting

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSeparator2_Description
data.value: Separator to split the on-deck #2 list users.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSeparator2_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck Separator Image 2

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSeparator_Description
data.value: Separator to split the on-deck list users.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSeparator_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck Separator Image

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSkip2_Description
data.value: Number of on-deck #2 users to skip at the top. If you want to hide people being processed, set this to your number of consoles.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSkip2_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck 2 Skips

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSkip_Description
data.value: Number of on-deck users to skip at the top. If you want to hide people being processed, set this to your number of consoles.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckSkip_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck Skips

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckTake2_Description
data.value: Number of users to show in the on-deck #2 list.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckTake2_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck 2 User Amount

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckTake_Description
data.value: Number of users to show in the on-deck list.

data.name: StreamSettings_OnDeckTake_DisplayName
data.value: On Deck User Amount

data.name: StreamSettings_TradeBlockFile_Description
data.value: Source File name of the image to be copied when a trade code is being entered. If left empty, will create a placeholder image.

data.name: StreamSettings_TradeBlockFile_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Block Image

data.name: StreamSettings_TradeBlockFormat_Description
data.value: Destination file name of the Link Code blocking image. {0} gets replaced with the local IP address.

data.name: StreamSettings_TradeBlockFormat_DisplayName
data.value: Link Code Block Image

data.name: StreamSettings_TrainerTradeStart_Description
data.value: Format to display the Now Trading details. {0} = ID, {1} = User

data.name: StreamSettings_TrainerTradeStart_DisplayName
data.value: Now Trading Format

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the list users. {0} = ID, {3} = User

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListFormat_DisplayName
data.value: User List Format

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListSeparator_Description
data.value: Separator to split the list users.

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListSeparator_DisplayName
data.value: User List Separator

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListSkip_Description
data.value: Number of users to skip at the top. If you want to hide people being processed, set this to your number of consoles.

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListSkip_DisplayName
data.value: Skipped User List

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListTake_Description
data.value: Number of users to show in the list.

data.name: StreamSettings_UserListTake_DisplayName
data.value: User List Amount

data.name: StreamSettings_UsersInQueueFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the Users in Queue. {0} = Count

data.name: StreamSettings_UsersInQueueFormat_DisplayName
data.value: User in Queue Format

data.name: StreamSettings_WaitedTimeFormat_Description
data.value: Format to display the Waited Time for the most recently dequeued user.

data.name: StreamSettings_WaitedTimeFormat_DisplayName
data.value: Waited Time Format

data.name: TeraTypeEmojiInfo_EmojiCode_Description
data.value: The Discord emoji string for this tera type.

data.name: TeraTypeEmojiInfo_MoveType_Description
data.value: The Tera Type.

data.name: TimingSettings_AvoidSystemUpdate_Description
data.value: Enable this to decline incoming system updates.

data.name: TimingSettings_AvoidSystemUpdate_DisplayName
data.value: Avoid System Update

data.name: TimingSettings_CheckGameDelay_Description
data.value: Enable this to add a delay for "Checking if Game Can be Played" Pop-up.

data.name: TimingSettings_CheckGameDelay_DisplayName
data.value: Check Game Pop-Up Delay

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraReconnectDelay_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait between attempts to reconnect. Base time is 30 seconds.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraReconnectDelay_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Reconnect Delay

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeAddFriend_Description
data.value: [RaidBot] Extra time in milliseconds to wait after accepting a friend.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeAddFriend_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Add Friend

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeCheckGame_Description
data.value: Extra Time to wait for the "Checking if Game Can Be Played" Pop-up.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeCheckGame_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Check Game

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeCloseGame_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait after clicking to close the game.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeCloseGame_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Close Game

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeConnectOnline_Description
data.value: [SWSH/SV/PLZA] Extra time in milliseconds to wait after clicking + to connect to Y-Comm (SWSH), L to connect online (SV), or after connecting to Portal (PLZA). Base time for PLZA is 8 seconds.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeConnectOnline_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Connect Online

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeDeleteFriend_Description
data.value: [RaidBot] Extra time in milliseconds to wait after deleting a friend.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeDeleteFriend_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Delete Friend

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeEndRaid_Description
data.value: [RaidBot] Extra time in milliseconds to wait before closing the game to reset the raid.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeEndRaid_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Reset Raid

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeJoinUnionRoom_Description
data.value: [BDSP] Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the Union Room to load before trying to call for a trade.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeJoinUnionRoom_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Union Room

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLeaveUnionRoom_Description
data.value: [BDSP] Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the overworld to load after leaving the Union Room.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLeaveUnionRoom_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Leave Union Room

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadGame_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait before clicking A in title screen.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadGame_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Game

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadOverworld_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the overworld to load after the title screen.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadOverworld_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Overworld

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadPortal_Description
data.value: [SV] Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the Poké Portal to load.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadPortal_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Portal

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadProfile_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait for profiles to load when starting the game.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadProfile_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Profile

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadRaid_Description
data.value: [RaidBot] Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the raid to load after clicking on the den.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeLoadRaid_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Raid

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenBox_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the box to load after finding a trade.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenBox_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Open Box

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenCodeEntry_Description
data.value: Time to wait after opening the keyboard for code entry during trades.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenCodeEntry_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time Starting Code Entry

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenRaid_Description
data.value: [RaidBot] Extra time in milliseconds to wait after clicking "Invite Others" before locking into a Pokémon.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenRaid_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Open Raid

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenYMenu_Description
data.value: [BDSP] Extra time in milliseconds to wait for the Y Menu to load at the start of each trade loop.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeOpenYMenu_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Load Y-Menu

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeReturnHome_Description
data.value: Extra time in milliseconds to wait after pressing HOME to minimize the game.

data.name: TimingSettings_ExtraTimeReturnHome_DisplayName
data.value: Extra Time to Return Home

data.name: TimingSettings_KeypressTime_Description
data.value: Time to wait after each keypress when navigating Switch menus or entering Link Code.

data.name: TimingSettings_KeypressTime_DisplayName
data.value: Switch Keypress Time

data.name: TimingSettings_ProfileSelectionRequired_Description
data.value: Enable this if you need to select a profile when starting the game.

data.name: TimingSettings_ProfileSelectionRequired_DisplayName
data.value: Profile Selection Required

data.name: TimingSettings_ReconnectAttempts_Description
data.value: Number of times to attempt reconnecting to a socket connection after a connection is lost. Set this to -1 to try indefinitely.

data.name: TimingSettings_ReconnectAttempts_DisplayName
data.value: Reconnection Attempts

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BanIDWhenBlockingUser_Description
data.value: When a person is blocked in-game for multiple accounts, their online ID is added to BannedIDs.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BanIDWhenBlockingUser_DisplayName
data.value: Ban All Accounts for NSO ID

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BannedIDMatchEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be appended to Echo alerts to notify whomever you specify when a user matches a banned ID. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BannedIDMatchEchoMention_DisplayName
data.value: Echo Banned NSO ID

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BannedIDs_Description
data.value: Banned online IDs that will trigger trade exit or in-game block.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BannedIDs_DisplayName
data.value: Banned NSO IDs

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BlockDetectedBannedUser_Description
data.value: When a person is encountered with a banned ID, block them in-game before quitting the trade.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_BlockDetectedBannedUser_DisplayName
data.value: Block Banned NSO ID

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_CooldownAbuseEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be appended to Echo alerts to notify whomever you specify when a user violates trade cooldown. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_CooldownAbuseEchoMention_DisplayName
data.value: Alert on Trade Cooldown

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDCooldown_Description
data.value: When a person ignores a trade cooldown, the echo message will include their Nintendo Account ID.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDCooldown_DisplayName
data.value: Echo Nintendo ID of User

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDLedy_Description
data.value: When a person using Ledy nickname swaps is detected of abuse, the echo message will include their Nintendo Account ID.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDLedy_DisplayName
data.value: Echo NSO ID Ledy

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDMultiRecipients_Description
data.value: When a person sending to multiple in-game accounts is detected, the echo message will include their Nintendo Account ID.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDMultiRecipients_DisplayName
data.value: Echo NSO ID Multi Recipient

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDMulti_Description
data.value: When a person using multiple Discord/Twitch accounts is detected, the echo message will include their Nintendo Account ID.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_EchoNintendoOnlineIDMulti_DisplayName
data.value: Echo NSO ID Multi

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_LedyAbuseEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be appended to Echo alerts to notify whomever you specify when a user violates Ledy trade rules. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_LedyAbuseEchoMention_DisplayName
data.value: Ledy Abuse Echo Mention

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_MultiAbuseEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be appended to Echo alerts to notify whomever you specify when a user is found using multiple accounts. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_MultiAbuseEchoMention_DisplayName
data.value: Notify on Using Multiple Accounts

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_MultiRecipientEchoMention_Description
data.value: If not empty, the provided string will be appended to Echo alerts to notify whomever you specify when a user is found sending to multiple players in-game. For Discord, use <@userIDnumber> to mention.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_MultiRecipientEchoMention_DisplayName
data.value: Notify on Sending to Multiple Accounts

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeAbuseAction_Description
data.value: When a person using multiple Discord/Twitch accounts is detected, this action is taken.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeAbuseAction_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Abuse Action

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeAbuseExpiration_Description
data.value: When a person appears with a different Discord/Twitch account in less than this setting's value (minutes), a notification will be sent.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeAbuseExpiration_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Abuse Expiration

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeCooldown_Description
data.value: When a person appears again in less than this setting's value (minutes), a notification will be sent.

data.name: TradeAbuseSettings_TradeCooldown_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Cooldown

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_AlphaMarkEmoji_Description
data.value: The emoji information for displaying the alpha mark.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_AlphaMarkEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Alpha Mark Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_AlphaPLAEmoji_Description
data.value: The emoji information for displaying the alpha emoji in Legends: Arceus.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_AlphaPLAEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Alpha PLA Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_CustomTypeEmojis_Description
data.value: Custom Emoji information for the move types.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_CustomTypeEmojis_DisplayName
data.value: Custom Type Emojis

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_FemaleEmoji_Description
data.value: The full string for the female gender emoji.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_FemaleEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Female Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MaleEmoji_Description
data.value: The full string for the male gender emoji.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MaleEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Male Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MightiestMarkEmoji_Description
data.value: The emoji information for displaying the mightiest mark.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MightiestMarkEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Mightiest Mark Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MoveTypeEmojis_Description
data.value: Will show Move Type Icons next to moves in trade embed (Discord only). Requires user to upload the emojis to their server.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MoveTypeEmojis_DisplayName
data.value: Show Move Type Emojis

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MysteryGiftEmoji_Description
data.value: The emoji information for displaying mystery gift status.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_MysteryGiftEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Mystery Gift Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_PreferredImageSize_Description
data.value: Preferred Species Image Size for Embeds.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_PreferredImageSize_DisplayName
data.value: Species Image Size

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ScreenOff_Description
data.value: Turns off the Switch's screen during trades

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ScreenOff_DisplayName
data.value: Screen Off

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowAbility_Description
data.value: Will show Ability in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowAbility_DisplayName
data.value: Show Ability

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowBall_Description
data.value: Will show Ball in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowBall_DisplayName
data.value: Show Ball

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowEVs_Description
data.value: Will show EVs in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowEVs_DisplayName
data.value: Show EVs

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowIVs_Description
data.value: Will show IVs in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowIVs_DisplayName
data.value: Show IVs

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowLanguage_Description
data.value: Will show PKM Language in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowLanguage_DisplayName
data.value: Show Language

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowLevel_Description
data.value: Will show Level in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowLevel_DisplayName
data.value: Show Level

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetDate_Description
data.value: Will show MetDate in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetDate_DisplayName
data.value: Show Met Date

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetLevel_Description
data.value: Will show Met Level in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetLevel_DisplayName
data.value: Show Met Level

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetLocation_Description
data.value: Will show Met Location in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowMetLocation_DisplayName
data.value: Show Met Location

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowNature_Description
data.value: Will show Nature in trade embed (Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowNature_DisplayName
data.value: Show Nature

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowScale_Description
data.value: Will show Scale in trade embed (SV & Discord only). Requires user to upload the emojis to their server.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowScale_DisplayName
data.value: Show Scale

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowTeraType_Description
data.value: Will show Tera Type in trade embed (SV & Discord only).

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_ShowTeraType_DisplayName
data.value: Show Tera Type

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_TeraTypeEmojis_Description
data.value: Tera Type Emoji information for the tera types.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_TeraTypeEmojis_DisplayName
data.value: Custom Tera Type Emojis

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UseEmbeds_Description
data.value: If true, will show beautiful embeds in your discord trade channels of what the user is trading. False will show default text.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UseEmbeds_DisplayName
data.value: Use Embeds

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UsePlusMoveEmoji_Description
data.value: The emoji information for displaying Plus Moves to applicable Moves in the Discord embed.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UsePlusMoveEmoji_DisplayName
data.value: Plus Move Emoji

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UseTeraEmojis_Description
data.value: Will show Move Type Icons next to moves in trade embed (Discord only). Requires user to upload the emojis to their server.

data.name: TradeEmbedSettingsCategory_UseTeraEmojis_DisplayName
data.value: Show Tera Type Emojis?

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_AllowBatchTrades_Description
data.value: Toggle to allow or disallow batch trades.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_AllowBatchTrades_DisplayName
data.value: Allow Batch Trades

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DefaultHeldItem_Description
data.value: Default held item to send if none is specified.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DefaultHeldItem_DisplayName
data.value: Default Held Item for Trades

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DisallowTradeEvolve_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will automatically cancel a trade if offered a Pokémon that will evolve.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DisallowTradeEvolve_DisplayName
data.value: Disallow Trade Evolve Offers

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DumpTradeLegalityCheck_Description
data.value: Dump Trade: If enabled, Dumping routine will output legality check information to the user.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_DumpTradeLegalityCheck_DisplayName
data.value: Dump Trade Legality Check

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_EnableSpamCheck_Description
data.value: Checks Nickname and OT for spam.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_EnableSpamCheck_DisplayName
data.value: Enable Spam Check

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_ItemTradeSpecies_Description
data.value: Select default species for "ItemTrade", if configured.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_ItemTradeSpecies_DisplayName
data.value: Default Species for Item Trades

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxDumpTradeTime_Description
data.value: Dump Trade: Dumping routine will stop after spending x seconds in trade.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxDumpTradeTime_DisplayName
data.value: Maximum Dump Trade Time (seconds)

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxDumpsPerTrade_Description
data.value: Dump Trade: Dumping routine will stop after a maximum number of dumps from a single user.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxDumpsPerTrade_DisplayName
data.value: Maximum Dumps per Trade

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxPkmsPerTrade_Description
data.value: Maximum pokemons of single trade. Batch mode will be closed if this configuration is less than 1

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxPkmsPerTrade_DisplayName
data.value: Maximum Pokémon per Trade

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxTradeCode_Description
data.value: Maximum Link Code.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxTradeCode_DisplayName
data.value: Maximum Trade Link Code

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxTradeConfirmTime_Description
data.value: Max amount of time in seconds pressing A to wait for a trade to process.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MaxTradeConfirmTime_DisplayName
data.value: Maximum Trade Confirmation Time (seconds)

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MinTradeCode_Description
data.value: Minimum Link Code.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_MinTradeCode_DisplayName
data.value: Minimum Trade Link Code

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_StoreTradeCodes_Description
data.value: If set to True, Discord Users trade code will be stored and used repeatedly without changing.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_StoreTradeCodes_DisplayName
data.value: Store and Reuse Trade Codes

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_SuggestRelearnMoves_Description
data.value: If set to True, each valid Pokemon will come with all suggested Relearnable Moves without the need for a batch command.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_SuggestRelearnMoves_DisplayName
data.value: Suggest Relearnable Moves by Default

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_TradeWaitTime_Description
data.value: Time to wait for a trade partner in seconds.

data.name: TradeSettingsCategory_TradeWaitTime_DisplayName
data.value: Trade Partner Wait Time (seconds)

data.name: TwitchSettings_AllowCommandsViaChannel_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will process commands sent to the channel.

data.name: TwitchSettings_AllowCommandsViaWhisper_Description
data.value: When enabled, the bot will allow users to send command via whisper (bypasses slow mode)

data.name: TwitchSettings_Channel_Description
data.value: Channel to Send Messages To

data.name: TwitchSettings_CommandPrefix_Description
data.value: Bot Command Prefix

data.name: TwitchSettings_DiscordLink_Description
data.value: Discord Server Link.

data.name: TwitchSettings_DistributionCountDown_Description
data.value: Toggles whether Distribution trades count down before starting.

data.name: TwitchSettings_DonationLink_Description
data.value: Donation Link.

data.name: TwitchSettings_MessageStart_Description
data.value: Message sent when the Barrier is released.

data.name: TwitchSettings_NotifyDestination_Description
data.value: Determines where generic notifications are sent.

data.name: TwitchSettings_SudoList_Description
data.value: Sudo Usernames

data.name: TwitchSettings_ThrottleMessages_Description
data.value: Throttle the bot from sending messages if X messages have been sent in the past Y seconds.

data.name: TwitchSettings_ThrottleSeconds_Description
data.value: Throttle the bot from sending messages if X messages have been sent in the past Y seconds.

data.name: TwitchSettings_ThrottleWhispersSeconds_Description
data.value: Throttle the bot from sending whispers if X messages have been sent in the past Y seconds.

data.name: TwitchSettings_ThrottleWhispers_Description
data.value: Throttle the bot from sending whispers if X messages have been sent in the past Y seconds.

data.name: TwitchSettings_Token_Description
data.value: Bot Login Token

data.name: TwitchSettings_TradeCanceledDestination_Description
data.value: Determines where TradeCanceled notifications are sent.

data.name: TwitchSettings_TradeFinishDestination_Description
data.value: Determines where TradeFinish notifications are sent.

data.name: TwitchSettings_TradeSearchDestination_Description
data.value: Determines where TradeSearch notifications are sent.

data.name: TwitchSettings_TradeStartDestination_Description
data.value: Determines where TradeStart notifications are sent.

data.name: TwitchSettings_TutorialLink_Description
data.value: Bot usage tutorial Link.

data.name: TwitchSettings_TutorialText_Description
data.value: Bot usage tutorial text.

data.name: TwitchSettings_UserBlacklist_Description
data.value: Users with these usernames cannot use the bot.

data.name: TwitchSettings_Username_Description
data.value: Bot Username

data.name: WebServerSettings_AllowExternalConnections_Description
data.value: Allow external connections to the web control panel. When false, only localhost connections are allowed.

data.name: WebServerSettings_ControlPanelPort_Description
data.value: The port number for the Bot Control Panel web interface. Default is 8080.

data.name: WebServerSettings_EnableWebServer_Description
data.value: Enable or disable the web control panel. When disabled, the web interface will not be accessible.

data.name: YouTubeSettings_ChannelID_Description
data.value: ChannelID to Send Messages To

data.name: YouTubeSettings_ClientID_Description
data.value: Bot ClientID

data.name: YouTubeSettings_ClientSecret_Description
data.value: Bot Client Secret

data.name: YouTubeSettings_CommandPrefix_Description
data.value: Bot Command Prefix

data.name: YouTubeSettings_MessageStart_Description
data.value: Message sent when the Barrier is released.

data.name: YouTubeSettings_SudoList_Description
data.value: Sudo Usernames

data.name: YouTubeSettings_UserBlacklist_Description
data.value: Users with these usernames cannot use the bot.
